definition: Consciousness arising dependent on nose and odor.
notes: The project prefers nose-consciousness because it maps cleanly onto the sixfold pattern without adding awkwardness. Olfactory consciousness is acceptable in explanatory prose when the technical faculty-role should remain explicit.

context_rules.context: In most analytical and source-facing contexts
In explanatory prose emphasizing the sensory modality

example_phrases.pali: ghānañca paṭicca gandhe ca uppajjati ghānaviññāṇaṃ
example_phrases.translation: dependent on the nose and odors, nose-consciousness arises
